## Issues (evidence-bound)

### P1

| ID | Finding | Personas | Evidence |
|----|---------|----------|----------|
| **I7** | No authentication enforced across any page — All navigated pages (/, /runs, /compare, /init, /runner, /config, /recommendations, /runs/*) are accessible without any login or authentication challenge. This violates access boundary expectations for an admin/buyer. | p3-admin | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |

### P2

| ID | Finding | Personas | Evidence |
|----|---------|----------|----------|
| **I1** | Error indicator on command center page despite pass outcome — The command center page shows an error label in the excerpt, which could mislead a new user into thinking something is wrong when the step outcome is 'pass'. | p1-evaluator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |
| **I2** | Runner page shows 'failed' errors — The runner page returns errors with status 'failed', which may indicate a broken workflow or misleading UI for a first-time evaluator exploring the product. | p1-evaluator | `j5-runner-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |
| **I4** | Command center page generates errors — Step j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1 loads with an error despite successful navigation. May indicate console errors or non-critical failures. | p2-operator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |
| **I5** | Compare runs page generates errors — Both navigate and wait steps for Compare runs (j3-compare) have 'error' in errors array. This could affect comparison functionality. | p2-operator | `j3-compare-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |
| **I6** | Runner page shows failures — Steps for Runner journey (j5-runner) have 'failed' in errors array, indicating potential issues in running or viewing runs. | p2-operator | `j5-runner-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |
| **I8** | Runner page shows 'failed' status — The /runner page displays a 'failed' status in the excerpt, indicating a potential operational issue that affects trust in the product's reliability. | p3-admin | `j5-runner-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |

### P3

| ID | Finding | Personas | Evidence |
|----|---------|----------|----------|
| **I3** | Compare runs page shows error indicators — The compare runs page has errors in its step excerpt, potentially reducing the evaluator's ability to understand the comparison feature. | p1-evaluator | `j3-compare-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |
| **I9** | Command center and Compare pages show 'error' — Both the command center and compare runs pages have an 'error' in the step outcome, which may indicate UI or backend issues that degrade the admin's ability to monitor. | p3-admin | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |

---

| **D1** | Clear navigation structure — Page has 29 links and 4 headings. | p1-evaluator, p2-operator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |

| **D3** | Accessible form labels — All 3 form inputs have labels or placeholders. | p3-admin | `j3-compare-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |
| **D4** | Fast interactions for repeat tasks — 13 steps completed under 3s. | p2-operator | `j1-command-center-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |
| **D5** | Sitemap shows comprehensive page coverage — The sitemap lists 36 pages and hub paths, indicating a well-structured product with rich feature set, which is reassuring for an admin evaluating the product. | p3-admin | `auto-j1-dashboard-p1-evaluator-s1-seed1-loop1` |
